figures.caption: Fig. 2. Illustration of the cVAE. The encoder, decoder, and prior networks are implemented using NNs. During training and inference, the latent variable z is inferred via the decoder network (switch in the lower position) and the prior network (switch in the upper position), respectively.

Fig. 1. Visualization of the indoor channel model with two APs (black points), one possible UE position (green point), and a possible location of the blocking object (red cuboid). The gray area corresponds to test set T3.
Fig. 4. Empirical cCDFs of the normalized rate achieved with different context-based CSI prediction and AP selection approaches at SNR = 10dB for the test sets (a) T1, (b) T2, and (c) T3.
